status: EXECUTED — 3 CTR fixes + 12 internal links deployed

ctr_fixes_executed.fix: Snippet cannibalization — removed exact $405.53 answer from meta. Replaced with curiosity-driven question + CTA.
ctr_fixes_executed.expected_impact: Removing the exact payment amount from the SERP snippet should force users to click to see their personalized number.

ctr_fixes_executed.fix: Meta rewritten from generic '125+ calculators' to action-oriented 'Calculate your loan payments, mortgage affordability...'
ctr_fixes_executed.expected_impact: More compelling snippet for branded searches — should improve CTR on position 1 impressions.

ctr_fixes_executed.fix: Meta rewritten from passive 'Should you save?' to active 'Not sure how much? See what... looks like for YOUR situation'
ctr_fixes_executed.expected_impact: Personalization hook should improve click-through from position 4.

off_topic_handling.action: LOW_PRIORITY — kept indexed but NOT optimized for CTR
off_topic_handling.90_day_fiance: NOINDEX_CONSIDER — pop culture content, weakest brand fit

gsc_ui_indexing: NOT executed for changed pages — CloakBrowser GSC UI requires separate session. Changed pages will be re-crawled naturally via sitemap.

corrected_baseline.expected_3_7_day_impact: CTR should improve from 0% to 2-5% on fixed pages. First clicks expected within 3-7 days as Google re-crawls changed metas.

biggest_blocker: CTR — 311 impressions with 0 clicks. Fixes applied today target the highest-impression pages. Monitor GSC daily for first click.
